description: Shortly after a new deployment, error rates spike, indicating a critical bug in the new version.

nodes.task_description: Identify the spike in errors from the monitoring dashboard and correlate it with the recent deployment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent quickly connects the errors to the new release.

nodes.task_description: Declare an incident and immediately initiate the rollback procedure in the CI/CD pipeline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent takes decisive action to restore service by deploying the previous stable version.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the system to confirm that error rates return to normal after the rollback is complete.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies that the rollback was successful and the system is stable.
